response.justification: Exceptional candidate with 14 years of full-stack engineering experience, significantly exceeding the 6-year requirement. Current and recent roles demonstrate direct alignment with the primary tech stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS) and explicitly include AI-agent infrastructure development. While Nest.js and Vitest aren't mentioned by name, the candidate's extensive testing expertise, backend framework experience, and demonstrated ability to master new technologies across roles suggest these are easily acquired. Strong engineering culture fit with TDD, pairing, and DevOps practices evident throughout career.
strengths: 14 years of progressive full-stack experience with recent roles directly matching primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB)
Current role explicitly involves AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks, directly addressing an emerging requirement
Demonstrated engineering excellence through TDD/pairing practices, organized testing education, and CS degree from ETH Zürich
concerns: Nest.js and Vitest not explicitly mentioned in resume despite being primary stack items (though testing framework expertise is extensive)
Kubernetes mentioned only in context of GISCollective deployment without detailed operational experience highlighted
Resume spans 14+ years with diverse projects and languages, which could suggest scattered focus rather than deep specialization in core stack

key_factors.factor: Direct alignment with primary tech stack
Missing explicit Nest.js and Vitest experience
